name: M.U.L.E.
description:
M.U.L.E. is a turn-based multiplayer strategy game set on the newly colonized planet Irata. Players compete as representatives of different species, each vying for economic dominance. The core gameplay revolves around resource management, land acquisition, and production. 

At the start of the game, players bid for plots of land. Each plot can be used to produce one of four resources: Food, Energy, Smithore, or Crystite. Production is facilitated by M.U.L.E.s (Multiple Use Labor Elements), which must be purchased and equipped for specific resources. The quantity produced depends on the plot type and random environmental factors. 

Players must balance their resource production with their needs. Food sustains the population, Energy powers production, and Smithore is necessary to create more M.U.L.E.s. Crystite is a valuable commodity sold on the galactic market for profit. Prices of all resources fluctuate based on supply and demand, creating a dynamic market that players must navigate. 

Random events, such as meteor strikes, plagues, and theft, can impact production and resource availability, adding an element of unpredictability. Players can also interact with each other through trading and occasional conflict. The game ends after a set number of turns, with the player accumulating the most wealth declared the winner.

controls.arrow_up: Move the player cursor up on the map during land selection, town menu navigation, and resource selection screens.
controls.arrow_down: Move the player cursor down on the map during land selection, town menu navigation, and resource selection screens.
controls.arrow_left: Move the player cursor left on the map during land selection, town menu navigation, and resource selection screens.
controls.arrow_right: Move the player cursor right on the map during land selection, town menu navigation, and resource selection screens.
controls.space: Select or confirm a selection during land purchase, town menu option selection, and resource selection. Also used to initiate production on a selected land plot after equipping a M.U.L.E.
controls.w: Select food production M.U.L.E. type for plot equipping in the store.
controls.a: Select energy production M.U.L.E. type for plot equipping in the store.
controls.s: Select smithore production M.U.L.E. type for plot equipping in the store.
controls.d: Select crystite production M.U.L.E. type for plot equipping in the store.
controls.q: Buy a M.U.L.E in the store.
controls.e: Equip a M.U.L.E. from inventory to a plot.
